metadata.name: data_pipeline
metadata.description: Extract, transform, and analyze data from multiple sources into a structured report

data.task: Extract and parse data from the uploaded source. Identify column types, missing values, and basic statistics. Output as structured JSON with schema
Perform the requested analysis type on the extracted data. For trends: time series decomposition. For anomalies: statistical outlier detection. For summary: descriptive statistics and distributions
Generate a markdown report combining the analysis results. Include data tables, key findings, and actionable insights. Format for executive readability
